$comment: Lightweight bootstrap-hint catalog. NOT pre-loaded profiles — these are suggestions the agent can offer the user. When the user agrees, the agent calls api_setup action=bootstrap with the docs_url to extract a real profile from the actual docs (not from training knowledge).
supported_auth_flows: oauth2 client_credentials grant (server-to-server, no browser redirect)
oauth2 refresh_token grant (if a refresh token is already held in the vault)
not_supported_auth_flows: oauth2 authorization_code grant with browser-redirect / callback-URL (in progress — APIs requiring this flow cannot be bootstrapped today)
do_not_proactively_suggest: payment providers (Stripe, PayPal, Adyen, etc.) — require explicit user-initiated setup
cloud / hosting / infrastructure providers (Hetzner, AWS, GCP, Azure, Cloudflare account API) — destructive-action risk
any API that mutates production billing, customer records, or live financial state without the user explicitly asking to wire it

suggested_apis.name: Hacker News (Algolia)
suggested_apis.value_prop: Hacker News full-text search across stories + comments. Public API, no key.

suggested_apis.name: GitHub REST API (public read)
suggested_apis.value_prop: Public repos, releases, issues, search. Unauthenticated 60 req/h per IP; a personal-access-token bumps it to 5000/h.

suggested_apis.name: npm Registry
suggested_apis.value_prop: Public npm package metadata: versions, latest, dist-tags. No key for read access.

suggested_apis.name: Wikipedia (MediaWiki API)
suggested_apis.value_prop: Wikipedia article summaries, search, full text. No key. Per-language hosts (en./de./fr./...).

suggested_apis.name: arXiv
suggested_apis.value_prop: arXiv preprint search + metadata. Atom XML responses. No key, ~3-second rate-limit between requests.

suggested_apis.name: Open-Meteo
suggested_apis.value_prop: Free weather forecasts + historical reanalysis. Lat/lon based, metric defaults. No key for non-commercial / low-volume use.

suggested_apis.name: Frankfurter (ECB FX rates)
suggested_apis.value_prop: ECB-sourced foreign-exchange rates, daily + historical timeseries back to 1999. Open-source, no key.

suggested_apis.name: REST Countries
suggested_apis.value_prop: Country metadata: ISO codes, capital, currency, languages, region, neighbors. Community-maintained, no key.

suggested_apis.name: Nager.Date (public holidays)
suggested_apis.value_prop: Public-holiday calendar for 100+ countries incl. DACH with per-region (Bundesland / Kanton) granularity. No key. Useful for holiday-aware scheduling + SLA business-day calculations.

suggested_apis.name: VATcomply (EU VAT + IBAN + FX)
suggested_apis.value_prop: Validate EU VAT numbers via VIES, decode IBANs, fetch ECB FX rates. No key. DACH/EU-relevant for B2B invoicing flows.
